open: Personify the technology when it clarifies the benefit.
Upend expectations with a short twist.
Go beyond literal features to reveal a wider human upside.
bold: Say what you mean with confident brevity.
Use contrast to sharpen the innovation story.
authentic: Write like you would to a friend.
Land on a tangible everyday benefit.

guardrails: Keep sentences concise and premium, not slang-heavy.
Do not brag or put down competitors.
Use wit only when it stays clear and useful.
User-facing copy should prefer AI Home or AI Living over SmartThings unless the official service name is required.
